full_name: Non-alloy structural steel S275JR, material number 1.0044 (formerly St44-2)
scope: Hot-rolled non-alloy structural steel with minimum yield strength 275 N/mm^2 and guaranteed Charpy V-notch impact of 27 J at +20 C (JR). Weldable general construction grade for buildings, bridges and load-bearing steelwork; the modern designation for the former DIN 17100 grade St44-2.
license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted DIN/EN document text
